milestones.title: Change and run the starter app
successCriteria: The visible status message in public/app.js is no longer the untouched starter text.

milestones.title: Store and format one book
successCriteria: Export createBookSummary(book) and include the title, author, and status in the returned summary.

milestones.title: Decide what happens with conditionals
successCriteria: Export describeReadingStatus(status) and return different messages for valid and invalid statuses.

milestones.title: Manage many books with arrays, objects, and loops
successCriteria: Export createSampleLibrary() and return at least three book objects with title, author, and status.

milestones.title: Clean up user input with parsing and regular expressions
successCriteria: Export parseBookInput(rawInput), handle invalid input clearly, and add tests/parsing.test.js.

milestones.title: Save, search, and organize your library
successCriteria: Create data/library.json and export filterBooksByStatus(books, status) plus sortBooksByTitle(books).

milestones.title: Understand the web and build a books API
successCriteria: Add GET and POST /api/books routes that return JSON responses.

milestones.title: Build the browser UI and finish the project
successCriteria: Add a form in public/index.html, fetch-based UI logic in public/app.js, a books table in db/schema.sql, and update the README.
